instruction: 帮我把NPS数据整理到备忘录里

command: DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true

python3 -c "
import openpyxl
wb = openpyxl.Workbook()
ws = wb.active
ws['A1'] = '客户群体'
ws['B1'] = '调研人数'
ws['C1'] = '推荐者(%)'
ws['D1'] = '被动者(%)'
ws['E1'] = '批评者(%)'
ws['A2'] = '企业客户'
ws['B2'] = 520
ws['C2'] = 62
ws['D2'] = 25
ws['E2'] = 13
ws['A3'] = '个人用户'
ws['B3'] = 1850
ws['C3'] = 45
ws['D3'] = 32
ws['E3'] = 23
ws['A4'] = '代理商'
ws['B4'] = 280
ws['C4'] = 58
ws['D4'] = 28
ws['E4'] = 14
wb.save('/home/user/Desktop/nps_survey.xlsx')
"

phases.instruction: 帮我把NPS数据整理到备忘录里
从/home/user/Desktop/nps_survey.xlsx中找到推荐者比例最高的客户群体，追加到/home/user/Desktop/nps_memo.txt末尾：'NPS最佳客户群：企业客户（推荐者62%）'，保存

include: NPS最佳客户群：企业客户（推荐者62%）
